wiki.summary: “So Be It” is the second single from Clipse’s 2025 album, "Let God Sort Em Out". The song, which is accompanied by a cold and ominous Arabic sample, features Pusha T and No Malice rap about their rich lifestyles and warn other rappers that they wouldn’t mind getting into a beef with them, no matter how chaotic the beef becomes. They want all the smoke. This tough mentality is highlighted in Pusha T’s final verse, in which he sends shots at Travis Scott. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “So Be It” is the second single from Clipse’s 2025 album, "Let God Sort Em Out". The song, which is accompanied by a cold and ominous Arabic sample, features Pusha T and No Malice rap about their rich lifestyles and warn other rappers that they wouldn’t mind getting into a beef with them, no matter how chaotic the beef becomes. They want all the smoke. This tough mentality is highlighted in Pusha T’s final verse, in which he sends shots at Travis Scott. Pusha later explained that his beef with Travis stems from 2023, when Travis played Pharrell Williams his album, "UTOPIA", at the Louis Vuitton headquarters while Clipse was working on their album. According to Pusha, Travis also played the song, “MELTDOWN", to Pharrell. However, he skipped Drake’s verse, which features disses aimed at Pharrell and Pusha T. Read more on Last.fm.
